additional_metadata: Etiological detector based on Ginzburg's indicial paradigm. Detects presence of a human writing process rather than stylometric similarity to AI output. 18 cognitive process features derived from psycholinguistics and information theory. Trained on corpus_v4: PAN 2025 Task 2, artnitolog, adversarially humanized AI texts, and RAID train supplement. XGBoost classifier, no neural backbone. Zero-shot on RAID test set. In-distribution: AUC 0.923, humanized AI recall 90.0% vs perplexity baseline 48.5% (41.5pp gap).
